ui.error_no_options: At least one option is required

server.timeout: Operation timed out (>{timeout}s), no user response

search_serper.missing_key: Error: SERPER_API_KEY environment variable not set.

search_arxiv.request_failed: arXiv API request failed, status code: {code}, response: {response}
search_arxiv.non_xml_content: arXiv returned non-XML content (possible proxy interception), first 200 chars: {content}
search_arxiv.xml_parse_error: arXiv returned XML format exception (possibly modified by proxy): {error}, raw content first 300 chars: {content}

search_ddgs.no_qualified: Return results quality is low, try to change the search keywords and retry.

search_pdf.no_text: Unable to extract text from PDF (scanned document or image PDF).
search_pdf.timeout: PDF processing timed out (exceeded {timeout}s). Try narrowing page_range or checking the network connection.

webpage_fetch.invalid_url: Error: URL must start with http:// or https://, current value: {url}
webpage_fetch.timeout: Request timed out (exceeded {timeout}s). Please check network or increase timeout parameter.
webpage_fetch.token_truncated:
## Webpage Content
**Length**: {tokens} tokens ({length} characters), {pct}% content truncated

ddgs_quality.truncate_fallback: Tiktoken truncation failed: {error}, falling back to character-based truncation
ddgs_quality.ai_eval_timeout: AI evaluation HTTP error: request timeout
